title: Vtuber Central Station SMP Modpack
description: Custom Modpack for the Vtuber Central Station Discord Minecraft Server
body:
This Create-centred modpack has been curated by ImJustSofa and DorrelRedmond for the Vtuber Central Station Discord server.

The modpack is based on [Allexio's Create Plus](https://modrinth.com/modpack/allexio-create+). 

It contains a variety of visual and content mods for a fun experience of a fairly vanilla styled modpack with only a few content additions and nearly full optimize parity for those that want those specific visual enhancements.

It contains a variety of visual and audio enhancements through mods such as 3D Skin Layers, Sound Physics Remastered, and even proximity chat via Simple Voice Chat!

We have custom world-generation in all dimensions utilizing Terralith, Tectonic, BetterEnd, and BetterNether.

To enhance the Create mod, we've added a handful of additions, such Slice & Dice, Steam 'n' Rails, and more to further enhance create. For those that are a bit more technically inclined, we even have CC:Tweaked and CC:C Bridge to allow for further create craziness!

While this modpack is intended to be used for our Discord Server, all are free to use it as they see fit!
